name: Clients
description: A Client is created from an Accepted application via the AcceptApplication server action. ownerEmail is the SCALAR row-scope key (= normalizeEmail(founderEmail)); the MANUAL Clients RowPolicy (App Settings -> Table Permissions) keys on it so Client/Funder 'use' users see only their own row while staff roles pass through. riskLevel and ein are INTERNAL/staff-only and are hidden from non-staff by a MANUAL ColumnPolicy (and excluded from the ClientPortalSafe view). siteId gives staff site scope (app-layer for now). These RowPolicy/ColumnPolicy controls are NOT in this artifact — they are configured manually in App Settings and gate client login.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: ownerEmail
columns.description: Scalar row-scope owner (= normalized founderEmail). The manual Clients RowPolicy keys on this for Client/Funder isolation.

columns.name: startDate
columns.description: Program start date. ISO 8601 date string, format: YYYY-MM-DD, e.g. 2025-09-30. ISO 8601 date string, format: YYYY-MM-DD, e.g. 2025-09-30.
